chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَمُوتُ وَ لَا تَتْرُكُ إِلَّا زَوْجَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The woman dies and she does not leave except for her husband

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/185)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/185)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ تَمُوتُ وَ لَا تَتْرُكُ وَارِثاً غَيْرَ زَوْجِهَا قَالَ الْمِيرَاثُ كُلُّهُ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about a woman who died and she did not leave an inheritor apart from her husband. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The inheritance, all of it is for him’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ibn Muskan from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who dies and leaves behind just her husband. He (the Imam) said, ‘The legacy belongs to him.’ He said, ‘It means that there are no other heirs besides the husband.’”
